commands.cmd_gemini: am start -n $(cmd package resolve-activity --brief com.google.android.apps.bard | tail -n 1)
commands.cmd_youtube_revanced: am start -n $(cmd package resolve-activity --brief app.revanced.android.youtube | tail -n 1)
commands.cmd_recorder: am start -n $(cmd package resolve-activity --brief com.oneplus.soundrecorder | tail -n 1); sleep 0.4; input tap 620 2500
commands.cmd_translate: am start -n $(cmd package resolve-activity --brief com.google.android.apps.translate | tail -n 1)
commands.cmd_flashlight: if [ $(cat /sys/class/leds/white:flash-1/brightness 2>/dev/null || echo 0) -eq 0 ]; then echo 60 > /sys/class/leds/white:flash-1/brightness; echo 60 > /sys/class/leds/yellow:flash-0/brightness; echo 1 > /sys/class/leds/led:switch_0/brightness; else echo 0 > /sys/class/leds/white:flash-1/brightness; echo 0 > /sys/class/leds/yellow:flash-0/brightness; echo 0 > /sys/class/leds/led:switch_0/brightness; fi
